markets.title: Will OpenAI be valued over one trillion dollars before 2028?
markets.canonical_text: OpenAI reaches a valuation greater than 1 trillion USD before 2028.
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves yes if accepted business press or a filing reports an OpenAI valuation above 1 trillion USD before 2028-01-01.

markets.title: Microsoft first to AGI by the end of 2027
markets.canonical_text: Microsoft or a majority-owned Microsoft AI lab is first among named companies to announce AGI before 2028.
markets.resolution_criteria: Resolves yes if Microsoft is judged first among listed companies to announce AGI before 2028-01-01.
